input.command:
cd /home/user/sandbox/workspace && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Batch display fixes, deep token security scanner, and codebase cleanup

- Fix Farcaster mini app frame overflow: replace ScrollArea with overflow-x-hidden div, use 100svh, remove min-h-screen
- Wire Alchemy and Moralis API keys via env.json
- Expand TokenRisk interface with taxes, holders, liquidity, contract age, verdict fields
- Upgrade security scanner to 6 steps: heuristics → Moralis → GoPlus token_security (full extraction) → honeypot.is simulation (5 chains) → GoPlus address_security → contract age via block explorer
- Add buildVerdict() for plain-English one-line risk summaries
- Show structured security panel (verdict + taxes + holders + liquidity + contract) in batch tab and swap tab From section
- Scan fromToken automatically on selection; show inline expanded panel in token dropdown for 'from' context
- Remove dead code: SwapHistory interface, unused state (walletTokens, contractAddressSearch, debugInfo), unused functions (searchTokenByContract, calculatePnl, getNativeTokenLogo, fetchTokenPrice, shareSwapReceipt, getBlockExplorerUrl), unused imports (useWallet, Share2, X, getAddress, useTokenList, AlchemyNetwork, alchemy, useSendTransaction, useWaitForTransactionReceipt)
- Delete RelaySwap.tsx.backup
- Fix Index.tsx to not import glassmorphic skeleton

🤖 Generated with [vie](https://vie.dev)

Co-Authored-By: vie <noreply@vie.dev>
EOF
)"

state.title:
cd /home/user/sandbox/workspace && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Batch display fixes, deep token security scanner, and codebase cleanup

- Fix Farcaster mini app frame overflow: replace ScrollArea with overflow-x-hidden div, use 100svh, remove min-h-screen
- Wire Alchemy and Moralis API keys via env.json
- Expand TokenRisk interface with taxes, holders, liquidity, contract age, verdict fields
- Upgrade security scanner to 6 steps: heuristics → Moralis → GoPlus token_security (full extraction) → honeypot.is simulation (5 chains) → GoPlus address_security → contract age via block explorer
- Add buildVerdict() for plain-English one-line risk summaries
- Show structured security panel (verdict + taxes + holders + liquidity + contract) in batch tab and swap tab From section
- Scan fromToken automatically on selection; show inline expanded panel in token dropdown for 'from' context
- Remove dead code: SwapHistory interface, unused state (walletTokens, contractAddressSearch, debugInfo), unused functions (searchTokenByContract, calculatePnl, getNativeTokenLogo, fetchTokenPrice, shareSwapReceipt, getBlockExplorerUrl), unused imports (useWallet, Share2, X, getAddress, useTokenList, AlchemyNetwork, alchemy, useSendTransaction, useWaitForTransactionReceipt)
